_README: Full-corpus (OpenProblemGarden, 227 problems) classification + roadmap for STATEMENT-ONLY Rocq/MathComp formalization, extending docs/digraph_conjecture_classification.json (which covered only the ~98 DIGRAPH conjectures) to the WHOLE OPG corpus (directed + undirected). Generated 2026-06-25 by a 16-classifier survey + synthesis over data/problems.json. Per-problem 'classifications' is the source of truth; 'roadmap' is the synthesized phase proposal. Tiers: core=ships in the combinatorial-core programme; deferred=needs reals/asymptotics, flows, infinite graphs, geometry/crossing, spectral, surfaces, or a complexity cost model.

classifications.title: 2-colouring a graph without a monochromatic maximum clique
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, (forall k, odd k -> k>=5 -> ~ induced_cycle G k) -> exists c:V->bool, forall Q, max_clique G Q -> ~ monochromatic c Q

classifications.title: Algorithm for graph homomorphisms
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, exists algo, forall G H, decides_hom algo G H /\ time algo <= c^(|G|+|H|)

classifications.title: Book Thickness of Subdivisions
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists f, forall G, book_thickness G <= f (book_thickness (subdivide1 G))
classifications.note: bounded by a function of subdivision's bt

classifications.title: Circular flow numbers of r-graphs
classifications.defer_reason: flow: nowhere-zero real-valued circular flow number
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall t>1, forall G, is_2t1_graph t G -> Fc G <= 2 + 2/t

classifications.title: Cycle Double Covers Containing Predefined 2-Regular Subgraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, cubic G -> 2connected G -> forall S, regular2 S -> connected (G - E S) -> exists C, cdc G C /\ cycles_of S \subset C

classifications.title: Double-critical graph conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, double_critical G -> chi G = n -> G = K_n

classifications.title: Forcing a K_6-minor
classifications.rocq_idiom: (forall G, mindeg G >= 7 -> minor K6 G) /\ (forall G, connectivity G >= 7 -> minor K6 G)

classifications.title: Hamiltonian paths and cycles in vertex transitive graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, connected G -> vertex_transitive G -> exists p, hamiltonian_path G p

classifications.title: Large induced forest in a planar graph
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, planar G -> exists S, induced_forest G S /\ |S| >= n/2

classifications.title: Minimum number of arc-disjoint transitive subtournaments of order 3 in a tournament
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall T:tournament n, exists F, arc_disjoint F /\ (forall t in F, TT3 t) /\ |F| >= ceil(n(n-1)/6 - n/3)

classifications.title: Partial List Coloring
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G L, (forall v, |L v|=t) -> t<=chi_l G -> exists C partial colouring colouring at least tn/chi_l vertices

classifications.title: Seagull problem
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, alpha G <= 2 -> minor (K (n/2)) G

classifications.title: Strong edge colouring conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, schi G <= (if even Delta then 5*Delta^2/4 else (5*Delta^2-2*Delta+1)/4)

classifications.title: Three-chromatic (0,2)-graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists G, (forall u v, u<>v -> #|common_nbr G u v| \in [0;2]) /\ chi G = 3

classifications.title: What is the largest graph of positive curvature?
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: combinatorial curvature over sphere embedding faces, extremal-size question
classifications.rocq_idiom: sup over G with planar G /\ mindeg>=3 /\ everywhere_positive_curvature G /\ ~prism G /\ ~antiprism G of |G|

classifications.title: 3-Colourability of Arrangements of Great Circles
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: arrangement graph defined from great circles on a sphere
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall S : set of great circles in general position, χ (arrangement_graph S) <= 3
classifications.note: Stronger 3-choosable variant; underlying graph is 4-regular planar but construction is geometric

classifications.title: Almost all non-Hamiltonian 3-regular graphs are 1-connected
classifications.defer_reason: reals/asymptotics: limit of a ratio of cardinalities as n->infinity
classifications.rocq_idiom: lim_{n->oo} NHB(n)/NH(n) = 1 over 3-regular graphs of order 2n

classifications.title: Bouchet's 6-flow conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G bidirected, (exists k, has_nz_flow G k) -> has_nz_flow G 6

classifications.title: Coloring and immersion
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall t G, χ G >= t -> immerses G (K t)

classifications.title: Cycles in Graphs of Large Chromatic Number
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall k G, χ G > k -> #|cycles of length ≡0 mod k in G| >= (k+1)(k-1)!/2

classifications.title: Drawing disconnected graphs on surfaces
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: optimal drawings / crossing number on general surfaces
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G1 G2 Σ, optimal_drawing (G1⊎G2) Σ -> images of G1 and G2 are disjoint

classifications.title: Fractional Hadwiger
classifications.defer_reason: reals: fractional chromatic / fractional Hadwiger numbers are LP/rational optima
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, χ_f G <= had G /\ χ G <= had_f G /\ χ_f G <= had_f G

classifications.title: Hamiltonicity of Cayley graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall (G:fingroup) (S:set), is_hamiltonian (Cayley G S)

classifications.title: Linear Hypergraphs with Dimension 3
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: intersection representation by triangles and segments in the plane
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H linear, dim(incidence_poset H) <= 3 -> exists family of triangles/segments realizing H

classifications.title: Mixing Circular Colourings
classifications.defer_reason: reals: circular-colouring mixing threshold M_c(G), rationality over reals
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, M_c(G) is rational

classifications.title: Partial List Coloring
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G r s, 1<=r<=s<=χ_ℓ G -> λ_r G / r >= λ_s G / s

classifications.title: Seymour's r-graph conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall r (G:r-graph), χ' G <= r+1

classifications.title: Strong matchings and covers
classifications.defer_reason: infinite: possibly infinite hypergraphs, strongly maximal matchings
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H hypergraph, edges bounded by k -> exists strongly_maximal_matching H /\ strongly_minimal_cover H

classifications.title: Triangle free strongly regular graphs
classifications.defer_reason: reals/spectral: strongly regular graph existence tied to eigenvalue/feasibility conditions
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists G, triangle_free G /\ strongly_regular G /\ G not among the 7 known

classifications.title: What is the smallest number of disjoint spanning trees made a graph Hamiltonian
classifications.defer_reason: reals: weighted complete graph, shortest spanning trees / shortest Hamiltonian path (TSP weights)
classifications.rocq_idiom: smallest k such that union of k greedy disjoint min spanning trees contains a Hamiltonian path

classifications.title: 3-Decomposition Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, cubic G -> connected G -> exists H1 H2 H3, spanning_tree H1 /\ two_regular H2 /\ matching H3 /\ edge_partition G [H1;H2;H3]
classifications.note: Decomposition of edge set into spanning tree + 2-regular + matching.

classifications.title: Antichains in the cycle continuous order
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists (Gs : nat -> sgraph), forall i j, i<>j -> ~ cycle_continuous (Gs i) (Gs j)
classifications.note: Cycle space / GF(2) flow structure; also infinite family. Jaeger Petersen-coloring lineage.

classifications.title: Bounding the chromatic number of triangle-free graphs with fixed maximum degree
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, triangle_free G -> chi G <= ceil(Delta G / 2) + 2
classifications.note: Clean inequality with ceil(Δ/2)+2; reuses χ and Δ.

classifications.title: Coloring random subgraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c:R, forall G, E[chi (G_{1/2})] > c * chi G / log (chi G)

classifications.title: Cyclic spanning subdigraph with small cyclomatic number
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall D, (forall C, strong_component D C -> nontrivial C) -> exists S, spanning S /\ cyclic S /\ cyclomatic S <= alpha D
classifications.note: Cyclomatic = |A|-|V|+1, finite; α already in corpus.

classifications.title: Earth-Moon Problem
classifications.rocq_idiom: max over G = union of two planar graphs of chi G (thickness-2 chromatic number)
classifications.note: Max chromatic number of thickness-2 graphs; uses planarity layer.

classifications.title: Frankl's union-closed sets conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall (F : {set {set T}}), union_closed F -> F != set0 -> exists x, 2 * #|[set A in F | x \in A]| >= #|F|
classifications.note: Pure finite set combinatorics, no graph needed; very clean.

classifications.title: Hedetniemi's Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G H, chi (tensor_product G H) = minn (chi G) (chi H)
classifications.note: Disproved by Shitov (2019); state and carry refutation. Needs tensor product primitive.

classifications.title: Linial-Berge path partition duality
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall D k, min_k_norm_path_partition D k <= max_induced_k_colorable D k

classifications.title: Monochromatic reachability or rainbow triangles
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall (T:tournament) (col:edge->'I_3), (exists rainbow directed triangle) \/ (exists v, forall u, mono_reachable col v u)

classifications.title: Partition of a cubic 3-connected graphs into paths of length 2
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, cubic G -> 3_connected G -> #|V G| = 3*k -> exists partition into k paths of length 2

classifications.title: Seymour's Second Neighbourhood Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall (D:oriented), exists v, outdeg D v <= second_outdeg D v
classifications.note: Classic digraph conjecture; second neighbourhood via distance-2.

classifications.title: Subdivision of a transitive tournament in digraphs with large outdegree
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists f:nat->nat, forall k D, min_outdeg D >= f k -> contains_subdivision D (transitive_tournament k)

classifications.title: Triangle-packing vs triangle edge-transversal
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G k, max_edge_disjoint_triangles G <= k -> exists S, #|S| <= 2*k /\ triangle_free (G - S)

classifications.title: Woodall's Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, let k := min_directed_cut G in exists k disjoint dijoins of G
classifications.note: Classic digraph packing conjecture (dual of Lucchesi-Younger); finite.

classifications.title: 3-Edge-Coloring Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, cubic G -> connected G -> 3edgecolorable G -> exists e, 3edgecolorable (suppress (G - e))
classifications.note: primary form is combinatorial 3-edge-colouring; 4-flow reformulation only in discussion

classifications.title: Antidirected trees in digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall D k, #|A D| > (k-2)*#|V D| -> forall T, antidirected_tree T -> order T = k -> contains_sub D T

classifications.title: Bounding the on-line choice number in terms of the choice number
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists family, forall M, exists G, chOL G - ch G >= M (gap unbounded); finite per-graph predicates, paintability game

classifications.title: Coloring the Odd Distance Graph
classifications.defer_reason: infinite graph on R^2 / real-plane geometry; chromatic number of an uncountable graph
classifications.rocq_idiom: chi (OddDistanceGraph over R^2) = infinity

classifications.title: Decomposing a connected graph into paths.
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, connected G -> exists ps, path_decomposition G ps /\ size ps <= (n+1)/2

classifications.title: Edge-disjoint Hamilton cycles in highly strongly connected tournaments.
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall k>=2, exists f, forall T tournament, strongly_connected_at_least f T -> exists k edge-disjoint Hamilton dicycles

classifications.title: Friendly partitions
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall r, finite { G : r-regular & ~ exists friendly_partition G } (cofinitely many r-regular graphs admit one)

classifications.title: Highly connected graphs with no K_n minor
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall n, exists N, forall G, #|V G|>=N -> n_connected G -> ~ minor G (K n) -> exists S, #|S|=n-5 /\ planar (G - S)

classifications.title: List chromatic number and maximum degree of bipartite graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, forall G bipartite, list_chromatic G <= c * log (maxdeg G)

classifications.title: Monochromatic vertex colorings inherited from Perfect Matchings
classifications.defer_reason: weighted complex-amplitude cancellation (quantum-physics motivated), characterization over (n,d) with real/complex weights
classifications.rocq_idiom: for which (n,d) exists bicolored G st all d monochromatic perfect-matching colourings have unit weight and others cancel

classifications.title: Partitioning edge-connectivity
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall a b G, (a+b+2)-edge-connected G -> exists partition {A,B} of E G, a-edge-connected (V,A) /\ b-edge-connected (V,B)

classifications.title: Seymour's self-minor conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G infinite, proper_minor G G

classifications.title: Subgraph of large average degree and large girth.
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall g k, exists d, forall G, avgdeg G >= d -> exists H subgraph_of G, avgdeg H >= k /\ girth H > g

classifications.title: Turán number of a finite family.
classifications.defer_reason: big-O asymptotic relation ex(n,F)=O(ex(n,family)) over n
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall family F, exists F0 in family, ex(n,F0) = O(ex(n,family)) as n->infinity

classifications.title: 3-flow conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, edge_connectivity G >= 4 -> exists_nz_flow G 3

classifications.title: Approximation ratio for k-outerplanar graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, forall k G, k_outerplanar k G -> approx_ratio_MaxEDP G <= c

classifications.title: Caccetta-Häggkvist Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall D, (forall v, outdeg D v >= r) -> exists c, dicycle D c /\ length c <= ceil(n/r)

classifications.title: Coloring the union of degenerate graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G1 G2, degenerate 1 G1 -> degenerate 2 G2 -> chi (union G1 G2) <= 5

classifications.title: Decomposing an eulerian graph into cycles
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, eulerian G -> exists D, cycle_decomposition G D /\ size D <= (n-1)/2

classifications.title: Edge list coloring conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, list_chromatic_index G = chromatic_index G
classifications.note: List Colouring Conjecture; multigraph edge colouring

classifications.title: Geodesic cycles and Tutte's Theorem
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, 3_connected G -> exists ell:E->R+, forall C, geodesic ell C -> peripheral C

classifications.title: 4-regular 4-chromatic graphs of high girth
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall g, exists G, regular 4 G /\ chi G = 4 /\ girth G >= g

classifications.title: List colorings of edge-critical graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, Delta_edge_critical G -> forall L, (forall e, size (L e) = Delta) -> ~(all_equal L) -> L_edge_colorable G

classifications.title: Monochromatic reachability in arc-colored digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall k, exists f, forall D col, exists S, union_of_stables f S /\ forall v, exists s in S, mono_path D col v s

classifications.title: The Two Color Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, orientation_of_planar G -> exists X1 X2, partition /\ acyclic (induced X1) /\ acyclic (induced X2)

classifications.title: Shannon capacity of the seven-cycle
classifications.rocq_idiom: shannon_capacity C7 = lim_n (alpha (strong_power C7 n))^(1/n) = ?

classifications.title: Switching reconstruction conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, #|V G| >= 5 -> forall H, same_switching_deck G H -> iso G H

classifications.title: Turán's problem for hypergraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H, 3_uniform H /\ #V = 3n /\ K4_3_free H -> #edges H <= n^2(5n-3)/2
classifications.note: needs hypergraph type; extremal but finite/bounded

classifications.title: 4-connected graphs are not uniquely hamiltonian
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, 4-connected G -> exists C, hamilton_cycle G C -> exists C', C' <> C /\ hamilton_cycle G C'
classifications.note: needs k-connectivity predicate and a Hamilton-cycle primitive plus distinct-cycle counting

classifications.title: Approximation Ratio for Maximum Edge Disjoint Paths problem
classifications.rocq_idiom: open-ended question about approximation ratio / APX-hardness of MaxEDP
classifications.note: algorithmic approximation + planarity; not a clean Prop

classifications.title: Characterizing (aleph_0,aleph_1)-graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: characterize graphs with bipartition where A-degrees aleph_0, B-degrees aleph_1

classifications.title: Colouring the square of a planar graph
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall planar G, chi(G^2) <= bound(Delta(G)) by cases on Delta
classifications.note: needs square-of-graph primitive plus planarity layer; finite combinatorial

classifications.title: Decomposing an eulerian graph into cycles with no two consecutive edges on a prescribed eulerian tour
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall eulerian G (min deg 4) and tour W, exists cycle decomposition avoiding two consecutive W-edges
classifications.note: needs eulerian-tour and cycle-decomposition primitives; finite

classifications.title: Edge Reconstruction Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G with >=4 edges, any H with same edge-deck (multiset of edge-deleted subgraphs up to iso) is iso to G
classifications.note: needs deck primitive over multiset of subgraphs

classifications.title: Goldberg's conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall multigraph G, chi'(G) <= max(Delta(G)+1, w(G)) with w the overfull density parameter
classifications.note: needs multigraph + edge-chromatic-index; ceil of ratio is integer arithmetic, no reals

classifications.title: Highly arc transitive two ended digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: highly arc-transitive two-ended digraph => every tile is disjoint union of complete bipartite graphs

classifications.title: List Colourings of Complete Multipartite Graphs with 2 Big Parts
classifications.rocq_idiom: smallest t with chi_ell(K_{a,b}+K_t) = chi(K_{a,b}+K_t)
classifications.note: needs list-chromatic primitive; finite but open-ended find-the-function

classifications.title: Multicolour Erdős–Hajnal Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists eps>0, every edge-colouring of K_n has either chi-pattern on k vtxs or n^eps vtxs with <=m-1 colours

classifications.title: Partitioning a tournament into k-strongly connected subtournaments
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists g(k_1..k_p), every g-strong tournament partitions into V_i each inducing nontrivial k_i-strong subtournament
classifications.note: bounded-existential over the function g; needs k-strong predicate

classifications.title: Shuffle-Exchange Conjecture (graph-theoretic form)
classifications.rocq_idiom: r(k,n) = 2n-1 where r is smallest r making (SE(k,n))^{r-1} rearrangeable
classifications.note: concrete circulant-like bipartite construction; rearrangeability is finite routing predicate

classifications.title: Switching reconstruction of digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists D on >=12 vertices that is switching-nonreconstructible
classifications.note: vertex-switch reverses incident arcs; finite digraph deck

classifications.title: Unfriendly partitions
classifications.rocq_idiom: every countably infinite graph has a 2-partition where each vertex has >= as many cross neighbours as own-class
classifications.note: finite case trivial; conjecture is about countably infinite graphs

classifications.title: 4-flow conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, bridgeless G -> ~ has_minor G Petersen -> has_nz_flow G 4

classifications.title: Arc-disjoint directed cycles in regular directed graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G k, k_regular G -> exists cs, arc_disjoint cs /\ all dicycle cs /\ size cs >= 'C(k+1,2)

classifications.title: Choice Number of k-Chromatic Graphs of Bounded Order
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G m, chi G = k -> #|V G| <= m*k -> ch G <= ch (Kmk m k)

classifications.title: Complete bipartite subgraphs of perfect graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, perfect G -> exists A B, Kbip in G or compl /\ |A|,|B| >= n^{1-o(1)}

classifications.title: Decomposing an even tournament in directed paths
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall T, even #|V| -> exists ps, dipath_decomp T ps /\ size ps = \sum_v max 0 (dout v - din v)

classifications.title: End-Devouring Rays
classifications.rocq_idiom: infinite rays/ends; not finite

classifications.title: Good Edge Labelings
classifications.rocq_idiom: finiteness of critical graphs with average degree < c; edge-density max

classifications.title: Hoàng-Reed Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: min outdeg >= k -> exists C_1..C_k dicycles, each C_j meets union of earlier in <=1 vertex

classifications.title: List Hadwiger Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, forall G t, ~has_minor G (K t) -> ch G <= c*t

classifications.title: Nearly spanning regular subgraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall eps k, exists r0, forall G r>=r0, regular -> exists H k-regular subgraph, |V H| >= (1-eps)|V G|

classifications.title: Pebbling a cartesian product
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G1 G2, p (G1 box G2) <= p G1 * p G2

classifications.title: Sidorenko's Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H bipartite, G, hom(H,G) >= (2|E G|/|V G|^2)^|E H| |V G|^|V H|
classifications.note: density/graphon, reals; explicitly deferred per rubric

classifications.title: The Berge-Fulkerson conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, bridgeless cubic G -> exists M1..M6 perfect matchings, each edge in exactly 2

classifications.title: Unions of triangle free graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: infinite graph, aleph_0 partition into triangle-free; set theory/ZFC

classifications.title: 57-regular Moore graph?
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists (G:sgraph), regular 57 G /\ diameter G = 2 /\ girth G = 5
classifications.note: Finite existence question; underlying proof is spectral but the statement is pure finite combinatorics.

classifications.title: Arc-disjoint out-branching and in-branching
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists k, forall D u v, k_arc_strong D -> exists Bout Bin, out_branching u Bout /\ in_branching v Bin /\ arc_disjoint Bout Bin

classifications.title: Choosability of Graph Powers
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists f, (f =o k^2) /\ forall G, ch (G^2) <= f (chi (G^2))

classifications.title: Complexity of the H-factor problem.
classifications.defer_reason: complexity (NP-hard) plus real min-degree threshold cn
classifications.rocq_idiom: NP_hard (fun G => exists F, H_factor H G F) for min-degree cn graphs

classifications.title: Decomposing eulerian graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G P, 6_edge_connected G -> eulerian G -> transition2 P -> exists D, compatible_decomposition G P D
classifications.note: Multigraph + transition system machinery is heavy but finite.

classifications.title: Erdős–Faber–Lovász conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall k G, union of k edge-disjoint K_k -> chi G = k
classifications.note: Proved for large k by Kang-Kelly-Kuhn-Methuku-Osthus (2021).

classifications.title: Graceful Tree Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall T, is_tree T -> exists l, graceful_labeling T l

classifications.title: Imbalance conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, (forall e, imb e > 0) -> graphic (M_G)

classifications.title: List Total Colouring Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H, chi_l (T H) = chi (T H)

classifications.title: Negative association in uniform forests
classifications.rocq_idiom: P(e in F | f in F) <= P(e in F) for uniform random forest F

classifications.title: Pentagon problem
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists g, forall G, cubic G -> girth G >= g -> exists h, hom G C5 h

classifications.title: Signing a graph to have small magnitude eigenvalues
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall d-regular A, exists symmetric signing S, spectral_radius S <= 2*sqrt(d-1)
classifications.note: Marcus-Spielman-Srivastava resolved the bipartite Ramanujan existence case.

classifications.title: The Bermond-Thomassen Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall k D, min_outdeg D >= 2*k-1 -> exists k vertex-disjoint dicycles

classifications.title: r-regular graphs are not uniquely hamiltonian.
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall r G, r > 2 -> regular r G -> ~ uniquely_hamiltonian G

classifications.title: 5-flow conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, bridgeless G -> exists phi, nowhere_zero_k_flow 5 G phi

classifications.title: Arc-disjoint strongly connected spanning subdigraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists k, forall D, k_arc_connected D -> exists S1 S2, arc_disjoint S1 S2 /\ spanning_strong S1 D /\ spanning_strong S2 D

classifications.title: Chords of longest cycles
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, k_connected 3 G -> forall C, longest_cycle G C -> exists e, chord G C e
classifications.note: Finite combinatorial; needs longest-cycle + chord predicates.

classifications.title: Consecutive non-orientable embedding obstructions
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists G, forall N1 N2 distinct non-orientable surfaces, minor_minimal_obstruction G N1 /\ minor_minimal_obstruction G N2
classifications.note: Non-orientable genus theory beyond current planarity layer.

classifications.title: Decomposing k-arc-strong tournament into k spanning strong digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall T k, tournament T -> k_arc_strong T -> exists D1..Dk, arc_partition /\ forall i, spanning_strong Di T

classifications.title: Erdős-Posa property for long directed cycles
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall l n, exists t, forall D, (exists n disjoint dicycles len>=l) \/ (exists T, #|T|<=t /\ D-T has no dicycle len>=l)
classifications.note: Gallai-Younger generalization; l=2 solved by Reed et al.

classifications.title: Graham's conjecture on tree reconstruction
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall T1 T2, is_tree T1 -> is_tree T2 -> (forall i, #|V(iter i L T1)| = #|V(iter i L T2)|) -> iso T1 T2
classifications.note: Iterated line graph order sequence determines tree.

classifications.title: Infinite uniquely hamiltonian graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists G, locally_finite G /\ one_ended G /\ regular r G /\ r>2 /\ uniquely_hamiltonian G

classifications.title: Long directed cycles in diregular digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall D d, oriented D -> strong D -> (forall v, indeg v >= d /\ outdeg v >= d) -> exists C, dicycle D C /\ length C >= 2*d+1

classifications.title: Non-edges vs. feedback edge sets in digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, simple_digraph G -> (no dicycle len<=3) -> beta G <= gamma G / 2

classifications.title: Petersen coloring conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, cubic G -> bridgeless G -> exists f: E(G)->E(Petersen), forall three mutually adjacent edges map to mutually adjacent

classifications.title: Simultaneous partition of hypergraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H1 H2 r-uniform on V, exists partition V1..Vr, forall i, #|edges of Hi meeting all classes| >= r!*m_i/r^r - o(m_i)

classifications.title: The Bollobás-Eldridge-Catlin Conjecture on graph packing
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G1 G2, #|V G1| = n -> #|V G2| = n -> (Delta G1 +1)*(Delta G2 +1) < n+1 -> pack G1 G2

classifications.title: Unit vector flows
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, bridgeless G -> exists phi: E(G)->S2, flow_conservation phi
classifications.note: S^2-valued flow over reals; implies Tutte 5-flow.

classifications.title: 5-local-tensions
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, forall G embedded loopless, edgewidth G >= c -> has_5_local_tension G
classifications.note: tension is the surface/flow-dual notion; needs abelian-group tension + edge-width on embedded graph

classifications.title: Are almost all graphs determined by their spectrum?
classifications.rocq_idiom: fraction of n-vertex graphs that are spectrally determined -> 1 as n -> infinity
classifications.note: eigenvalues of adjacency matrix + asymptotic 'almost all'

classifications.title: Chromatic Number of Common Graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists k, forall H common, chi H <= k
classifications.note: 'common' defined via asymptotic minimisation of homomorphism counts

classifications.title: Cores of Cayley graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall M abelian, forall Cayley G on power of M, exists k, core G is Cayley on power M
classifications.note: core = minimal retract via homomorphisms; finite, reuses Cayley infrastructure

classifications.title: Hamilton decomposition of prisms over 3-connected cubic planar graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G 3-conn cubic planar, exists two edge-disjoint Hamilton cycles partitioning E(G box K2)
classifications.note: prism = Cartesian product with K2; needs Hamilton-decomposition predicate

classifications.title: Every 4-connected toroidal graph has a Hamilton cycle
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G toroidal 4-connected, has_hamilton_cycle G
classifications.note: toroidal = genus-1 embeddable; needs surface/genus layer beyond planar

classifications.title: Graphs with a forbidden induced tree are chi-bounded
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall T tree, exists f, forall G, ~has_induced T G -> chi G <= f (omega G)
classifications.note: Gyarfas-Sumner conjecture; bounded-existential over function f

classifications.title: The intersection of two perfect matchings
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G bridgeless cubic, exists M1 M2 perfect matchings, no odd edge-cut subset of M1 cap M2
classifications.note: stated combinatorially (no actual flow needed despite NZF keyword)

classifications.title: Lovász Path Removal Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists f, forall k G x y, f k -connected G -> exists induced path P from x to y, k-connected (G - V P)
classifications.note: bounded existential over connectivity function f(k)

classifications.title: Number of Cliques in Minor-Closed Classes
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, forall t G n-vertex Kt-minor-free, #cliques G <= c^t * n
classifications.note: c^t n growth bound; asymptotic counting

classifications.title: PTAS for feedback arc set in tournaments
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists PTAS for min feedback arc set over tournaments
classifications.note: directed (FAS in tournaments); complexity/algorithm cost model; resolved by Kenyon-Mathieu-Schudy

classifications.title: Universal point sets for planar graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists P subset R^2 of size O(n), every n-vertex planar graph has straight-line embedding into P
classifications.note: real point sets + O(n) size; heavy geometry

classifications.title: The Borodin-Kostochka Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, maxdeg G >= 9 -> chi G <= maxn (maxdeg G - 1) (omega G)
classifications.note: clean inequality in chi, omega, Delta

classifications.title: Universal highly arc transitive digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists locally-finite highly-arc-transitive universal digraph
classifications.note: infinite locally finite digraphs + arc-transitivity automorphism action

classifications.title: A generalization of Vizing's Theorem?
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H d-uniform with codegree<=r, exists (r+d-1)-edge-colouring proper on (d-1)-intersecting edges
classifications.note: d=2 is Vizing; needs hypergraph layer

classifications.title: Are critical k-forests tight?
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall k-uniform H, critical k-forest H -> k-tree H

classifications.title: Chromatic number of 3/3-power of graph
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, Delta G>=2 -> chi(power(subdiv(G,3),3)) <= 2*Delta G + 1

classifications.title: Cores of strongly regular graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G strongly-regular, core G = G \/ core G = complete

classifications.title: Degenerate colorings of planar graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall planar G, exists 5-colouring, any k classes induce (k-1)-degenerate graph

classifications.title: Every prism over a 3-connected planar graph is hamiltonian
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G 3-connected planar, hamiltonian (G box K2)
classifications.note: needs Cartesian product and Hamilton cycle predicates

classifications.title: Grunbaum's Conjecture
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: needs orientable-surface triangulation and dual beyond planar layer
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G loopless triangulation of orientable surface, 3-edge-colourable (dual G)

classifications.title: Jaeger's modular orientation conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall 4k-edge-connected G, exists orientation, indeg-outdeg = 0 mod (2k+1) at each v

classifications.title: (m,n)-cycle covers
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall bridgeless G, exists list of 5 cycles covering each edge exactly twice

classifications.title: Obstacle number of planar graphs
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: point-set drawings, polygonal obstacles, visibility
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists planar G, obstacle_number G > 1; exists k, forall planar G, obstacle_number G <= k

classifications.title: Ramsey properties of Cayley graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, forall abelian G, exists symmetric S, Cayley(G,S) has no clique/indep > c log|G|

classifications.title: Splitting a digraph with minimum outdegree constraints
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists f, forall D mindeg+>=d, exists 2-partition, each induced part has mindeg+ >= f(d)... actually >= d
classifications.note: Thomassen d=1, f(1)=3; bounded-existential over f

classifications.title: The circular embedding conjecture
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: surface embedding with circular face boundaries
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall 2-connected G, exists surface embedding, each face boundary is a cycle

classifications.title: Universal Steiner triple systems
classifications.rocq_idiom: which STS S satisfy: every cubic G is S-edge-colourable
classifications.note: needs Steiner triple system design layer

classifications.title: A gold-grabbing game
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: exists optimal strategy pair achieving game value of leaf-pruning gold game on a tree
classifications.note: open-ended 'find strategy'; formalize as game-value/first-player-advantage predicate

classifications.title: Are different notions of the crossing number the same?
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: crossing number as minimum over plane drawings
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall G, pair_cr G = cr G

classifications.title: Chromatic number of random lifts of complete graphs
classifications.defer_reason: reals/probability: concentration of chi over random lifts
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: chi of a random h-lift of K5 is whp on a single value

classifications.title: Counting 3-colorings of the hex lattice
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: lim (number of proper 3-colorings of torus hex map)^(1/|V|) exists/=value

classifications.title: Directed path of length twice the minimum outdegree
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall G:Oriented, min_outdeg G = k -> exists dipath of length 2k
classifications.note: Thomasse strengthening; implies Caccetta-Haggkvist but not itself in named corpus

classifications.title: Exact colorings of graphs
classifications.defer_reason: infinite: countably infinite complete graph and subgraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: P(c,m) iff m<=2 or c=m, over exact c-colorings of K_omega

classifications.title: Half-integral flow polynomial values
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall G 2-edge-connected, Phi(G,5.5) > 0

classifications.title: Jones' conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall G planar, fvs G <= 2 * cycle_packing G

classifications.title: Mapping planar graphs to odd cycles
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall G planar, girth G >= 4k -> exists hom G -> C_{2k+1}
classifications.note: planar restriction of Jaeger modular orientation

classifications.title: Odd-cycle transversal in triangle-free graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall G triangle-free on n vtx, exists <= n^2/25 edges whose removal makes G bipartite

classifications.title: Random stable roommates
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: P(random roommates instance solvable) = Theta(n^{-1/4})

classifications.title: Stable set meeting all longest directed paths
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall G:DiGraph, exists stable set S meeting every longest directed path
classifications.note: generalizes Gallai-Roy; proven for stability number<=2

classifications.title: The Crossing Number of the Complete Bipartite Graph
classifications.defer_reason: geometry: crossing number as drawing minimum (Zarankiewicz)
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall m n, cr(K_{m,n}) = floor(m/2)floor((m-1)/2)floor(n/2)floor((n-1)/2)

classifications.title: Vertex Coloring of graph fractional powers
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: forall G connected (Delta>=3) m>1 n>m, chi(G^{m/n}) = omega(G^{m/n})
classifications.note: needs power and subdivision constructors; finite

classifications.title: A homomorphism problem for flows
classifications.rocq_idiom: Definition: hom Cayley(M,B)->Cayley(M',B') -> (forall G, has_Bflow G -> has_B'flow G)
classifications.note: B-flows are group-valued flows on digraphs

classifications.title: Asymptotic Distribution of Form of Polyhedra
classifications.rocq_idiom: open-ended limiting distribution of beta=v/(k+2) as k->inf
classifications.note: open-ended question, not a fixed predicate

classifications.title: Circular choosability of planar graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: best real upper bound on cch(G) over planar G

classifications.title: Covering powers of cycles with equivalence subgraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: eq(C_n^k) = Omega(k)
classifications.note: could be bounded if quantifier reformulated, but Omega growth defers

classifications.title: Do any three longest paths in a connected graph have a vertex in common?
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall connected G, forall 3 longest paths, exists common vertex
classifications.note: longest path = path of max length; finite predicate

classifications.title: Extremal problem on the number of tree endomorphism
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall n-vertex tree T, #endo(path) <= #endo(T) <= #endo(star)

classifications.title: Hamilton cycle in small d-diregular graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall d>2, oriented G, diregular d, |V|<=4d+1 -> exists Hamilton dicycle

classifications.title: Jorgensen's Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G 6-connected, no K6 minor -> apex (planar + 1 vertex)

classifications.title: Matching cut and girth
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall d, exists g, forall G avgdeg<d & girth>=g -> has matching-cut

classifications.title: Odd cycles and low oddness
classifications.rocq_idiom: G bridgeless cubic, some 2-factor all-odd cycles -> oddness(G)<=2

classifications.title: Real roots of the flow polynomial
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, forall real r root of Q_G, r<=4

classifications.title: Star chromatic index of complete graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: chi'_s(K_n) = O(n)

classifications.title: The Crossing Number of the Complete Graph
classifications.rocq_idiom: cr(K_n) = (1/4)floor(n/2)floor((n-1)/2)floor((n-2)/2)floor((n-3)/2)

classifications.title: Are vertex minor closed classes chi-bounded?
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall proper vertex-minor-closed F, exists f, forall G in F, chi G <= f(omega G)
classifications.note: chi-bounded is bounded-existential; vertex-minor finite op

classifications.title: Acyclic edge-colouring
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, exists c: edge-colouring with Delta+2 colours, proper /\ every cycle uses >=3 colours
classifications.note: need cycle-rainbow-3 predicate over edge colouring

classifications.title: Barnette's Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, planar /\ 3-connected /\ cubic /\ bipartite -> exists hamiltonian cycle

classifications.title: Circular coloring triangle-free subcubic planar graphs
classifications.defer_reason: circular chromatic number is a rational/real ratio threshold (20/7)
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, triangle-free /\ planar /\ Delta<=3 -> chi_c(G) <= 20/7
classifications.note: chi_c expressible as rational k/d existence, but defer with planarity+ratio

classifications.title: Crossing numbers and coloring
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G t, chi(G)>=t -> cr(G) >= cr(K_t)
classifications.note: crossing number is combinatorial min but heavy geometry

classifications.title: Does the chromatic symmetric function distinguish between trees?
classifications.defer_reason: symmetric function in infinitely many indeterminates / power-sum algebra
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists T1 T2 trees, ~iso T1 T2 /\ X_{T1} = X_{T2}

classifications.title: Faithful cycle covers
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G p, admissible p /\ (forall e, even p e) -> exists list of cycles covering each e exactly p e times
classifications.note: generalises CDC; integer edge weights finite

classifications.title: Hamiltonian cycles in line graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, 4-connected(line-graph G) -> hamiltonian(line-graph G)

classifications.title: Kriesell's Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G T k, (forall u v in T, 2k edge-disjoint u-v paths) -> exists k edge-disjoint trees each spanning T

classifications.title: Matchings extend to Hamiltonian cycles in hypercubes
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall d M, matching M in Q_d -> exists hamiltonian cycle H, M subset E(H)
classifications.note: need hypercube Q_d construction + matching extension

classifications.title: Oriented chromatic number of planar graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: max over oriented planar G of min k, exists homomorphism G -> tournament on k vertices
classifications.note: directed; bounded-existential form: exists k bound for all oriented planar

classifications.title: Reconstruction conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G H, |V|>=3 /\ deck G = deck H (as multiset up to iso) -> G iso H
classifications.note: deck = multiset of vertex-deleted subgraphs up to iso

classifications.title: Star chromatic index of cubic graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, subcubic G -> star-chromatic-index G <= 6
classifications.note: proper edge colouring with no bicoloured P4/C4

classifications.title: The Crossing Number of the Hypercube
classifications.defer_reason: asymptotic limit of crossing number / 4^d (reals + geometry)
classifications.rocq_idiom: lim cr(Q_d)/4^d = 5/32

classifications.title: Weak pentagon problem
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, cubic /\ triangle-free -> exists 5-edge-colouring s.t. complement of each colour class is bipartite
classifications.note: equiv to homomorphism to Clebsch graph; finite combinatorial

classifications.title: Acyclic list colouring of planar graphs.
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, planar G -> acyclically_choosable G 5
classifications.note: needs list (choosability) + acyclic (no bichromatic cycle) predicates over planarity layer

classifications.title: Total Colouring Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, total_chromatic G <= maxdeg G + 2
classifications.note: needs colouring of vertices+edges jointly; finite combinatorial primitive

classifications.title: Circular colouring the orthogonality graph
classifications.rocq_idiom: circular_chromatic O = 4 where O has vertex set lines in R^3
classifications.defer_reason: infinite vertex set (lines in R^3) + reals + circular chromatic real-valued

classifications.title: Crossing sequences
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall decreasing seq a, exists G, forall i, mincrossing_on_genus G i = a_i
classifications.defer_reason: crossing numbers as real/integer minima over surface embeddings; geometry

classifications.title: Domination in cubic graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, cubic G -> 3.connected G -> domnum G <= ceil(|G|/3)
classifications.note: reuses domination from dom.v; ceil is integer division

classifications.title: Finding k-edge-outerplanar graph embeddings
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists polytime algorithm finding minimal k-edge-outerplanar embedding

classifications.title: Hamiltonian cycles in line graphs of infinite graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall locally-finite G, 4-edge-connected G -> hamiltonian (line G)
classifications.defer_reason: infinite (locally finite) graphs with Freudenthal compactification / hamilton circles

classifications.title: Laplacian Degrees of a Graph
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall connected G, forall k, c_k G >= d_k G (c_k via Laplacian eigenvalues)

classifications.title: Melnikov's valency-variety problem
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, |V|>=2 -> chromatic G > ceil(floor(w G/2)/(|V|-w G))
classifications.note: w(G)=number of distinct degrees; finite integer predicate

classifications.title: Oriented trees in n-chromatic digraphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall T oriented tree |T|=k, forall D, dichromatic D >= 2k-2 -> T subdigraph of D
classifications.note: digraph chromatic number; needs oriented-tree subdigraph embedding primitive

classifications.title: Reed's omega, delta, and chi conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, chromatic G <= ceil((maxdeg G + 1 + omega G)/2)

classifications.title: Strong 5-cycle double cover conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G cubic bridgeless, forall circuit C, exists 5 cycles double-covering E with C in one
classifications.note: cycle double cover primitive (set of 2-regular subgraphs covering each edge twice)

classifications.title: The Erdös-Hajnal Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H, exists d>0, forall G H-induced-free, max(omega G, alpha G) >= |G|^d
classifications.defer_reason: real exponent δ(H) and |V|^δ polynomial growth (reals/asymptotics)

classifications.title: Weak saturation of the cube in the clique
classifications.rocq_idiom: wsat(K_n, Q_3) = value: min edges of F s.t. E(K_n)\E(F) addable one-at-a-time each completing a Q_3
classifications.note: bootstrap-percolation style weak saturation; finite but needs Q_3 and the add-process primitive; determine value (open-ended)

classifications.title: Ádám's Conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall D, (exists c, dicycle D c) -> exists a, num_dicycles(reverse D a) < num_dicycles D
classifications.note: counting directed cycles is a new finite predicate; tournament restriction also open

classifications.title: Beneš Conjecture (graph-theoretic form)
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall L regular 2-stage, (exists m, externally_connected (L^m)) -> rearrangeable (L^(2m))
classifications.note: needs layered/permutation-routing primitives but finite combinatorial

classifications.title: Circular flow number of regular class 1 graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall t G, regular(2t+1) G -> class1 G -> Fc G <= 2 + 2/t
classifications.note: circular flow number over reals -> deferred

classifications.title: Cycle double cover conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, bridgeless G -> exists L:list cycle, forall e, count(e in L) = 2
classifications.note: flagship; needs list-of-cycles cover predicate, purely combinatorial

classifications.title: Domination in plane triangulations
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists n0, forall G, plane_triangulation G -> |V G| >= n0 -> domnum G <= |V G|/4

classifications.title: Forcing a 2-regular minor
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall t G H, avgdeg G >= (4/3)t-2 -> 2regular H -> |V H|=t -> minor H G
classifications.note: avg degree as rational bound (multiply through), minors exist

classifications.title: Hamiltonian cycles in powers of infinite graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: countable connected G -> hamiltonian (G^3); 2-connected -> hamiltonian (G^2)
classifications.note: infinite countable graphs and Diestel-style topological cycles

classifications.title: Large acyclic induced subdigraph in a planar oriented graph
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall D, planar(oriented) D -> exists S, acyclic(induced D S) /\ |S| >= 3/5 |V D|
classifications.note: directed planar; ratio bound multiply through

classifications.title: Minimal graphs with a prescribed number of spanning trees
classifications.rocq_idiom: alpha(n)=min{k | exists G on k verts with exactly n spanning trees}; alpha(n)=o(log n)

classifications.title: Packing T-joins
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, forall graft (G,T), min_tcut(G,T)>=k -> exists tjoin packing of size >= (2/3)k-c
classifications.note: bounded-existential constant c; T-join/T-cut primitives finite

classifications.title: Ryser's conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall H r-uniform r-partite, tau H <= (r-1) * nu H

classifications.title: Strong colorability
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G, strongly_colorable G (2 * maxdeg G)
classifications.note: strong colouring w.r.t. all partitions into blocks of size <=r

classifications.title: The three 4-flows conjecture
classifications.rocq_idiom: forall G bridgeless, exists A1 A2 A3 partition E, forall i, nz4flow (G minus Ai)

classifications.title: Weighted colouring of hexagonal graphs
classifications.rocq_idiom: exists c, forall hexagonal G, weighting p, chi(G,p) <= (9/8) omega(G,p) + c
classifications.note: hexagonal = induced subgraph of triangular lattice; weighted chi/omega finite, rational bound

clusters.name: directed-new (digraph-theory extensions)
clusters.notes: New directed statements that reuse the existing HB DiGraph->Oriented->Tournament hierarchy, strongb, outdeg, dipath/dicycle. Continue the existing P-phase numbering.

clusters.name: directed-existing (already in corpus)
clusters.notes: Already shipped by digraph-theory's 48 statement nodes; no new work, listed for completeness.

clusters.name: list-and-choosability
clusters.notes: Single list-assignment/choosability layer over coq-graph-theory colouring unlocks 11 core; the 5 deferred are reals/asymptotic (circular choosability, bipartite Delta asymptotics, graph-power choosability).

clusters.name: cycle-covers-and-decomposition
clusters.notes: All finite; reuse existing cycle/eulerian notions. Only the circular-embedding variant is deferred (needs surface faces).

clusters.name: hamiltonicity
clusters.notes: Cheap undirected ham-cycle/path predicate over existing path machinery. 3 deferred are infinite (line-graphs/powers of infinite graphs) or asymptotic (almost-all 3-regular).

clusters.name: edge-and-total-colouring
clusters.notes: All via line-graph/total-graph constructions feeding existing chi. Only star-chromatic-index-of-complete-graphs is deferred (asymptotic value).

clusters.name: homomorphism-and-cores
clusters.notes: All finite; build hom/core on top of sgraph morphisms. High fame:cost (Hedetniemi).

clusters.name: degree-labeling-misc
clusters.notes: Heterogeneous finite remainder; each needs a small bespoke predicate. 2 deferred (good-edge-labeling avg-degree asymptotic, regular-subgraph asymptotic).

clusters.name: chromatic-number-bounds
clusters.notes: The cleanest, most famous cluster (Reed, Borodin-Kostochka): directly over existing omega/chi/Delta. Ship FIRST.

clusters.name: minors-immersion-hadwiger
clusters.notes: Reuse coq-graph-theory minors/treewidth; only immersion+apex are new. 3 deferred (fractional Hadwiger, clique-count asymptotic, infinite self-minor).

clusters.name: chi-boundedness
clusters.notes: Bounded-existential idiom (exists f, forall G...). Only Erdos-Hajnal (polynomial growth) is deferred.

clusters.name: packing-covering-extremal
clusters.notes: Min-max duality predicates over existing matching/König. Jones needs planarity layer. 1 deferred (Turan number asymptotic).

clusters.name: reconstruction
clusters.notes: One deck/multiset-of-iso-classes primitive serves all five. Famous (Ulam).

clusters.name: hypergraphs-set-systems
clusters.notes: Frankl is clean set-systems (no hypergraph layer). uniform-hypergraph primitive shared with Vizing-generalization/EFL. 2 deferred (Turan asymptotic, simultaneous-partition asymptotic).

clusters.name: connectivity-and-trees
clusters.notes: Reuse Menger/connectivity. 1 deferred (spanning-trees-hamiltonicity weighted/asymptotic).

clusters.name: planar-colouring
clusters.notes: Reuse graph-theory -planar layer; combine with colouring/list primitives.

clusters.name: matchings-and-snarks
clusters.notes: Reuse existing matching/Konig; cubic-bridgeless predicates. 1 deferred (complete-bipartite subgraphs of perfect graphs asymptotic).

clusters.name: longest-paths
clusters.notes: Clean; reuse path machinery. Linial-Berge is directed (partly in corpus).

clusters.name: network-routing
clusters.notes: Finite routing predicates; bespoke but small.

clusters.name: domination
clusters.notes: Reuse coq-graph-theory dom.v; cubic is clean, triangulation needs planarity layer.

clusters.name: planar-structure
clusters.notes: Albertson-Berman; reuse planarity layer + induced-forest predicate.

clusters.name: flows-tensions (DEFERRED)
clusters.notes: DEFER: undirected nowhere-zero/group/circular flows need their own algebraic-flow layer (Z_k flows, flow polynomial).

clusters.name: density-asymptotic (DEFERRED)
clusters.notes: DEFER: reals/Landau/densities/thresholds via mathcomp-analysis. Graphon-flavoured (Sidorenko).

clusters.name: crossing-geometry (DEFERRED)
clusters.notes: DEFER: crossing numbers as real minima over drawings; geometric representations need Euclidean layer.

clusters.name: infinite (DEFERRED)
clusters.notes: DEFER: drop finiteness assumption; needs infinite-graph + ends infrastructure absent from both libraries.

clusters.name: algebraic-spectral (DEFERRED)
clusters.notes: DEFER mostly: eigenvalue bounds need linear-algebra/reals. Only the Moore graph (57-regular) is a finite existence statement and is core.

clusters.name: complexity-algorithms (DEFERRED)
clusters.notes: DEFER: need a Turing/cost computation model; state only the math predicate (existence of algorithm with ratio bound).

clusters.name: surface-topology (DEFERRED)
clusters.notes: DEFER: higher-genus embeddings, face structure, curvature — beyond the current planar-only -planar layer.

primitive_roi.reuse_basis: coq-graph-theory paths/connectivity; mirror digraph-theory dipath/dicycle for the undirected sgraph
existing cycle and eulerian notions; cycle space as GF(2) edge subsets via mathcomp bigop
coq-graph-theory colouring/chi; generalise a colouring to respect per-vertex list (finType of colours)
existing chi/colouring applied to a constructed line-graph and total-graph sgraph
sgraph morphisms; product constructions on finType vertex pairs (parallels digraph-theory lexprod/Cayley)
degree (deg) + bigop \sum and existing cycle-length/girth notions
new finType of hyperedges over a vertex finType; matching/cover reuse König-style definitions

primitive_roi.primitive: reconstruction deck: vertex/edge/switching-deck as multiset of iso-classes
primitive_roi.reuse_basis: graph isomorphism on sgraph + mathcomp multiset/bag over quotient by iso

primitive_roi.primitive: min-max packing/covering duality predicates (triangle-packing/transversal, t-join/t-cut, graph-packing, weak-saturation)
primitive_roi.reuse_basis: existing matching/König and set-partition; bounded-existential idiom
reuse coq-graph-theory minors/treewidth; immersion as edge-disjoint paths routing

primitive_roi.primitive: clean chromatic predicates (double-critical, valency-variety, zero-two-graph, edge-disjoint-clique-union)
primitive_roi.reuse_basis: directly over existing omega/chi/Delta/clique; no new structure
extend digraph-theory strongb, N_out/N_in, dipath to arc-connectivity and branchings

primitive_roi.primitive: planar derived constructions (graph-square, degenerate-/acyclic-colouring, union-of-two-planar, plane-triangulation)
primitive_roi.reuse_basis: graph-theory -planar layer (K_uuuu/Wagner/surfaces) combined with colouring/list primitives and dom.v

phases.title: Clean chromatic-number bounds (Reed, Borodin-Kostochka)
phases.rationale: Highest fame:cost. Reed's omega/Delta/chi and Borodin-Kostochka are clean over existing omega/chi/Delta; tiny predicates. Ship first.

phases.title: Hamiltonicity (cycle/path predicate + products)
phases.rationale: Famous (Barnette, Cayley, prisms) and the ham predicate is cheap, mirroring digraph-theory's dicycle. Some members reuse the planarity layer.

phases.title: Homomorphisms, cores, and graph products
phases.rationale: Hedetniemi + pentagon are famous and fully finite; one hom/core/product layer unlocks the whole cluster and feeds later colouring/power phases.

phases.title: List colouring & choosability layer
phases.rationale: One choosability generalisation of existing chi unlocks 11 core (list-edge-colouring conj, list-Hadwiger, list-total). High reuse.

phases.title: Edge & total colouring
phases.rationale: Goldberg/Behzad/Seymour-r-graph via line-graph and total-graph feeding existing chi; depends on U4's list layer for list-edge variants.

phases.title: Cycle covers & decompositions
phases.rationale: Cycle Double Cover Conjecture is marquee; all finite, reusing eulerian/cycle notions. Shares cubic-bridgeless with U10.

phases.title: Minors, immersion & Hadwiger-type
phases.rationale: K6-minor/seagull/Jorgensen reuse coq-graph-theory minors+treewidth; only immersion and apex are new. Cheap, famous.

phases.title: chi-boundedness (binding-function idiom)
phases.rationale: Bounded-existential statements directly over chi/omega; Gyarfas-type. Reuses U3 induced-subgraph notions.

phases.title: Packing/covering duality + connectivity & trees
phases.rationale: Min-max predicates reuse matching/Menger/König; Tuza, BEC, Kriesell, Lovász removal. Jones needs planarity layer.

phases.title: Matchings, snarks & Petersen colouring
phases.rationale: Berge-Fulkerson + Petersen colouring reuse existing matching; tight links to U6 cycle covers.

phases.title: Reconstruction (deck machinery)
phases.rationale: One deck-as-multiset-of-iso-classes primitive serves all five (Ulam, edge, switching, Graham).

phases.title: Hypergraphs & set systems
phases.rationale: Frankl union-closed is clean set-systems; Ryser/Turan-hypergraph/k-forests share the uniform-hypergraph primitive also used by Vizing-generalisation and EFL.

phases.title: Planar colouring & domination + remaining finite misc
phases.rationale: Catch-all finite remainder over the -planar layer, dom.v, and several bespoke small predicates; lower fame:cost so scheduled after the marquee phases.

phases.title: Directed extensions (reuse digraph-theory)
phases.rationale: Continue the existing digraph P-phase numbering; all reuse strongb/outdeg/dipath. Large but mechanical given the directed base.

phases.title: DEFERRED: nowhere-zero flows & tensions
phases.rationale: Needs an algebraic Z_k-flow / flow-polynomial layer; defer until the combinatorial core ships.

phases.title: DEFERRED: density & asymptotic
phases.rationale: Reals/Landau/densities/thresholds via mathcomp-analysis; graphon-flavoured (Sidorenko).

phases.title: DEFERRED: crossing & geometry
phases.rationale: Crossing numbers as real minima over drawings; Euclidean representation layer.

phases.title: DEFERRED: infinite graphs & ends
phases.rationale: Requires dropping finiteness and building ends infrastructure absent from both libraries.

phases.title: DEFERRED: algebraic/spectral
phases.rationale: Eigenvalue bounds need linear-algebra/reals. Exception: the finite 57-regular Moore-graph existence is core and can be pulled into U1/U7 if desired.

phases.title: DEFERRED: surface topology
phases.rationale: Higher-genus embeddings/faces/curvature beyond the current planar-only layer.

phases.title: DEFERRED: complexity & algorithms
phases.rationale: Needs a Turing/cost model; state only the math predicate (existence of an algorithm with a ratio bound).

roadmap.summary: 227 problems: 142 core, 85 deferred. Of the core, 36 are directed (20 NEW + 4 already-shipped in digraph-theory's 48 nodes, plus 12 directed members embedded in mixed clusters); the bulk (106) are the undirected/topological/extremal/algebraic remainder that should drive the new phases by reusing coq-graph-theory's omega/chi/clique/minor/treewidth/planarity. Recommended core-first sequencing by fame:cost: U1 clean chromatic bounds (Reed, Borodin-Kostochka) -> U2 hamiltonicity -> U3 homomorphisms/cores/products (Hedetniemi) -> U4 list/choosability layer -> U5 edge/total colouring -> U6 cycle covers (CDC) -> U7 minors/immersion (K6, seagull) -> U8 chi-boundedness -> U9 packing/covering+connectivity -> U10 matchings/snarks (Berge-Fulkerson, Petersen) -> U11 reconstruction -> U12 hypergraphs (Frankl, Ryser) -> U13 planar/domination/misc catch-all; then continue the existing directed P-numbering with P9 for the 20 new directed statements. The five highest-ROI new primitives are the choosability layer (11 core), chromatic-index-via-line-graph (11), homomorphism/core+products (11), cycle-double-cover/cycle-space (14), and the hamiltonian predicate (12) - all thin extensions of existing structures. The deferred tail (D1 flows 14, D2 density/asymptotic 15, D3 crossing/geometry 10, D4 infinite 9, D5 spectral 7, D6 surface 4, D7 complexity 5 = 85 minus the lone core Moore graph counted in D5) is scheduled last because each needs heavy new infrastructure (reals/analysis, Euclidean geometry, infinite types, eigenvalues, genus faces, or a cost model)."
edge_candidates: 5_flow_conjecture_statement -> 4_flow_conjecture is FALSE direction; instead 4_flow_conjecture_statement (every bridgeless graph with no Petersen minor has a NZ 4-flow) -> 3_edge_coloring_conjecture for cubic graphs (NZ 4-flow on cubic <-> 3-edge-colourable)
berge_fulkerson_conjecture_statement -> the existence of a 5-CDC-type cover (Fulkerson implies a 6-cover yielding CDC for cubic bridgeless)
list_total_colouring_conjecture_statement -> behzads_conjecture (list total colouring implies total colouring / Total Colouring Conjecture)
edge_list_coloring_conjecture_statement -> goldbergs_conjecture region (list chromatic index = chromatic index relates the two edge-colouring bounds)
list_hadwiger_conjecture_statement -> hadwiger (list version implies ordinary chromatic Hadwiger; and forcing_a_k_6_minor is the k=6 ordinary case)
reeds_omega_delta_and_chi_conjecture_statement -> the_borodin_kostochka_conjecture (Reed's bound implies B-K for large Delta / both bound chi between omega and Delta+1)
double_critical_graph_conjecture_statement is the k-chromatic case implying complete-graph structure -> relates to forcing_a_k_6_minor via Hadwiger
strong_edge_colouring_conjecture_statement -> bounds for ordinary chromatic index (strong chromatic index >= chromatic index)
pentagon_problem_statement -> weak_pentagon_problem (homomorphism to C5 implies the weaker fractional/bipartite-complement version)
graphs_with_a_forbidden_induced_tree_are_chi_bounded_statement <- the_erdos_hajnal_conjecture-flavoured polynomial bound (deferred, but an implication edge once both stated)
triangle_packing_vs_triangle_edge_transversal_statement (Tuza) -> fractional relaxation bound; relate to jones_conjecture cycle-packing/FVS duality
caccetta_haggkvist_conjecture_statement -> directed_cycle_of_length_twice_the_minimum_outdegree and seymours_second_neighbourhood (known CH implications, already in directed corpus)
